arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot 'rules out' move for 24-year-old as Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen wing-back Jeremie Frimpong is reportedly not a concrete transfer target for Liverpool in 2025, as Arne Slot prefers a traditional right-back.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star makes feelings clear after Everton do Liverpool Premier League title favour
arts.sum: Chelsea were unable to take advantage of their early kick-off as they were held by Everton - which left the door open for Liverpool to further increase their advantage at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive 'clumsy' referee verdict after Trent Alexander-Arnold challenge vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Liverpool face Tottenham in the Premier League with Trent Alexander-Arnold prompting an early penalty discussion between Mike Dean and Gary Neville

arts.ttl: Gary Neville hails Trent Alexander-Arnold for his role in Liverpool's opening goal against Tottenham as he compares the Reds star to Premier League icons
arts.sum: Gary Neville marveled at Trent-Alexander Arnold's assist for Liverpool's opening goal against Tottenham on Sunday.
Liverpool head to Tottenham Hotspur as they look to keep their Premier League lead alive.

arts.ttl: Spurs fans protest against Daniel Levy ownership ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur supporters have gathered to protest against chairman Daniel Levy and the club’s ENIC ownership ahead of Sunday’s fixture with Liverpool. Around 300 fans joined together outside the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium with ‘Levy out’ banners, while black balloons were handed out and will be displayed in the stadium at kick-off. The supporters are […] The post Spurs fans protest against Daniel Levy ownership ahead of Liverpool clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Spurs v Liverpool team news: Spence starts, Johnson + Jota subs
arts.sum: The line-ups from the final match of Gameweek 17 The post Spurs v Liverpool team news: Spence starts, Johnson + Jota subs appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Spurs fans react on social media after a bizarre Squid Game tie-in was staged at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium prior to their clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: As Spurs prepared to play host to the league leaders, supporters at the stadium were treated to various activities inspired by the hit Netflix show Squid Game.

arts.ttl: Why Federico Chiesa is not in Liverpool squad for Tottenham
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has been left out by Arne Slot for the Premier League meeting between Liverpool and Tottenham

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Liverpool - Djed Spence starts as Postecoglou sticks
arts.sum: Now the overused Spurs players must take to the turf again at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium against a Liverpool team that has had an extra day to recover and was the subject of numerous changes for their Carabao Cup quarter-final at Southampton. Postecoglou's threadbare squad have battled through this week with back-to-back victories in games against Southampton and Manchester United in the Premier League and Carabao Cup respectively and managing to score nine goals across those two encounters despite having 10 unavailable first team players in each.
